name: Superheavy Samurai Flutist
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カゲボウ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand. During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each effect of "Superheavy Samurai Flutist" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand. During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each effect of "Superheavy Samurai Flutist" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand. During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each effect of "Superheavy Samurai Flutist" once per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
